label: Equal Relations
title: Equal Relations — Lesson One
completionSummary:
Two things are equal when the picture confirms it — stacking or dotted lines.

known equals unknown

label: Part-Whole Relations
title: Part-Whole Relations — Lesson Two
completionSummary:
A part-whole relation: two parts together equal the whole.

p1 plus p2 equals whole  ·  whole minus p1 equals p2

label: Comparisons & Differences
title: Comparisons and Differences — Lesson Three
completionSummary:
A comparison is a part-whole relation. Smaller plus difference equals larger.

larger minus smaller equals difference

label: Fractional Relations
title: Fractional Relations — Lesson Four
completionSummary:
A fractional relation shows one equal part of a whole.

the part is one fraction of the whole

label: Multiplicative Relations
title: Multiplicative Relations — Lesson Five
completionSummary:
Same picture, two directions — fractional and multiplicative.

the part is one fraction of the whole  ·  the whole is N times the part

label: Compound Relations
title: Compound Relations — Lesson Six
completionSummary:
Two unknowns, two relations, solved one at a time.

find the solvable relation first — its solution unlocks the second
